base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of guile_stage — a tile from 1991 street fighter ii. Guile's USAF airbase — F-14 Tomcat jet background. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Guile's USAF airbase — F-14 Tomcat jet background
